title: Change automation ownership
excerpt:

posts.author: vitorrd (Vitor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

Is there a way to take ownership of an automation? I had to deactivate an account that had a number of automations, and all of them were then disabled. I intend to keep them in one single account so they’re easier to manage.

How would I go about doing that?

Thanks!

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @vitorrd, can you write into support@monday.com about this? Then we can take care of it for you
